$comment: TODO: Evaluate built-in Office 365 service provider connector trade-offs. CURRENT CHOICE: Managed API connector for approval email workflow. REASON: The ApiConnectionWebhook action for approval emails (/approvalmail/$subscriptions with callback URL) is only available via the managed API connector. Built-in Office 365 service provider connectors support Send Email (V2) and Send Email with Options, but NOT the approval-email-with-callback pattern required by this workflow. TRADE-OFFS: Managed API = out-of-process, OAuth delegated, requires Microsoft.Web/connections resource, cannot use VNet integration directly. Built-in = in-process, lower latency, VNet-compatible, but lacks approval callback functionality. RECOMMENDATION: Keep managed API for approval workflows; use built-in only for simple send-email scenarios without approval logic.
